title: RP Tags
description: This a resource pack meant to use the Optifine CIT. Changes the stone button to text that goes above nametags so someone can determine their RP status
body:
A simple Resource Pack made for TTRP. Giving tags to everyone to see over their name tags. It is a little funky but overall i think its good!

Tag List:
- OOC
- RP
- Text RP
- DNI
- Private
- Interact
- !
- ?
- $

If you have suggests for more tags LMK!
Their uses i suggest looking at the changelog as it will basically show every item ive added
